description: This is a Python source file implementing a minimal HTTP server used for preview readiness checks, with endpoints for health status and basic info.

classes.name: Handler
classes.description: HTTP request handler class for readiness and basic info responses.

methods.name: None _send_json(self, status_code: int, payload: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Sends a JSON response with given status code and payload.

methods.name: None _send_text(self, status_code: int, text: str)
methods.description: Sends a plain text response with given status code.

methods.name: None do_GET(self)
methods.description: Handles GET requests, serving health/status info or error.

methods.name: None log_message(self, format: str, *args: object)
methods.description: Overrides the default log_message to suppress logging.

methods.name: None main()
methods.description: Main entry point, sets up and starts the HTTP server.

ctags.name: _send_json
ctags.pattern: /^    def _send_json(self, status_code: int, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:$/

ctags.name: _send_text
ctags.pattern: /^    def _send_text(self, status_code: int, text: str) -> None:$/

ctags.name: do_GET
ctags.pattern: /^    def do_GET(self) -> None:  # noqa: N802 (BaseHTTPRequestHandler naming)$/

ctags.name: log_message
ctags.pattern: /^    def log_message(self, format: str, *args: object) -> None:$/
